data.title: 'It's A Really, Really Bad Idea' — Suze Orman Warns 58-Year-Old Against Using A 401k To Buy A Lifetime Annuity
Is Tariff An Issue For Restaurant Sector? J.P. Morgan Highlights Winners & Losers
data.description: J.P. Morgan analyst John Ivankoe hosted Bloomin' Brands, CAVA Group and others at the Las Vegas forum. A major takeaway: focus on "doing fewer things better" with continued investments in customer and employee experiences. The analyst recommends adding fresh investments in BROS, SBUX, and CAVA, while maintaining cautious optimism on CMG and EAT.

data.title: Options Corner: Smart Money Inflows Into Salesforce Signal A Possible Recovery Play
data.description: Although Salesforce has encountered macroeconomic headwinds, the smart money is sniffing out a recovery play in CRM stock.

data.title: Peter Schiff Says Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Is A 'Scam' To Lure Americans Into Buying More Crypto
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) critic Peter Schff is warning that the strategic Bitcoin reserve is a tool to trick Americans into speculative losses.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: 'Volatility Will Likely Be Hanging Around' — TrueShares CEO On Rising Demand For Buffered ETFs
data.description: Market volatility has led to re-evaluation of risk management. Buffered ETFs, like TrueShares Structured Outcome ETF, offer downside protection and upside potential. CEO of TrueMark Investments explains why these ETFs are in demand.
